title: aristolochia glandulosa var. glabra
intro: Aristolochia glandulosa var. glabra, also known as the smooth Dutchman's pipe, is a type of flowering plant in the Aristolochiaceae family native to China. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include antipyretic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Aristolochia glandulosa var. glabra include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various respiratory and digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and stems are typically dried and used to make teas, infusions, or decoctions for medicinal purposes.
